message:
feat(vendored): streaming output subscription + unified client + tailer integration

- wa-nu4.4.1.3: UnifiedClient with backend selection (CLI/vendored),
  BackendSelectionInputs, evaluate_backend_selection(), build_unified_client()
- wa-nu4.4.1.5: Vendored compatibility tests + mux_client codec tests
- wa-nu4.4.2.2: PaneDelta, SubscriptionConfig, PaneOutputSubscription,
  subscribe_pane_output() with seqno gap detection and backpressure
- wa-nu4.4.2.3: TailerMode, detect_tailer_mode(), StreamingBridge
  converting PaneDelta→StreamEvent→CapturedSegment via existing StreamIngester
- wa-nu4.4.1 epic: all 7 child tasks closed

Tests: 2736 base / 2785 vendored (all passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
